messages.text:
OFFER: price=60
<message>Offering X for 60 ZUP. I am open to reasonable negotiation.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources>X: 1</my resources>
<my goals>Sell X for at least 40 ZUP. Cost to produce X was 40 ZUP.</my goals>
<reason>I should start with a high but plausible asking price above cost to leave room for bargaining. Since I am the seller and my minimum acceptable value is 40 ZUP, proposing 60 ZUP is a reasonable opening anchor.</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 60</newly proposed trade>
<message><message>Offering X for 60 ZUP. I am open to reasonable negotiation.</message></message>

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=60
Accepted at 60 ZUP.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>The seller asked for 60 ZUP. My private value is 100 ZUP, so 60 is within my limit and leaves positive surplus. Since the offer is reasonable and I want to reach a valid deal, I will accept rather than counter.</reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>NONE</newly proposed trade>
<message>Accepted at 60 ZUP.</message>
